content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(header)
H: auth ∧ risk ⇒ verify
P: drop_hdr("x-user-id") → keep_401
V: spoof_denied ∧ "401"
A: authz_bypass

[AUDIT]
Goal: review(header).
Hypothesis: auth and risk implies verify.
Plan: drop the header path("x-user-id") then keep 401 behavior.
Verify: spoofed requests denied and "401".
Answer target: authorization bypass.
